ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 💡 Browse all Lucide icons at lucide.dev/icons
ast.target: 💡 在 lucide.dev/icons 浏览所有 Lucide 图标

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
• Does the QuickAdd feature work as you would like?
  • Are the color categories working as you would like?
  • Do the periodic notes work and behave as expected?
  • Is it clear how to edit the calendar's look?
ast.target:
• 快速添加功能是否符合您的预期？
  • 颜色分类是否按您期望的方式工作？
  • 周期性笔记是否正常工作并符合预期？
  • 是否清楚如何编辑日历的外观？

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Share feedback via GitHub or e-mail.
ast.target: \n 通过 GitHub 或 电子邮件 分享反馈。\n

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Filename format for daily notes. Format reference
ast.target: 每日笔记的文件名格式。格式参考

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: If the Periodic Notes plugin is installed and a note type is enabled there, prioritize its settings over the ones below.
ast.target: 如果已安装 周期性笔记插件 并且启用了某种笔记类型，则优先使用其设置而非下方设置。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Week start day is configured in Basic Settings \u2192 Week starts on.
ast.target: 周起始日在 基本设置 \\u2192 周起始于 中配置。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Using settings from the Periodic Notes plugin. Disable "Use Periodic Notes plugin settings" above to customize here.
ast.target: 正在使用 周期性笔记插件 的设置。请禁用上方的“使用周期性笔记插件设置”以在此处自定义。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Visually organize notes with colors and icons based on conditions. Categories are checked in order, first match wins.
ast.target: 根据条件使用颜色和图标对笔记进行视觉组织。分类按顺序检查，首次匹配即生效。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Filename format for period notes. Format reference
ast.target: 周期性笔记的文件名格式。格式参考

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Help me improve the plugin! It means a lot to me ✨🦈
ast.target: 帮助我改进插件！这对我意义重大 ✨🦈

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No custom period groups defined. Click "Add Group" to create one.
ast.target: 未定义自定义周期组。点击“添加组”创建一个。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Default settings for all periods in this group:
ast.target: 此组中所有周期的默认设置：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: ⋮⋮ Drag to reorder priority — first match wins
ast.target: ⋮⋮ 拖动以重新排列优先级 — 首个匹配项生效

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No categories yet. Click "+ Add category" below to create your first one.
ast.target: 暂无分类。点击下方的“+ 添加分类”来创建您的第一个分类。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Search for emoji or Lucide icon:
ast.target: 搜索表情符号或 Lucide 图标：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No conditions yet. Add at least one condition for this category to match notes.
ast.target: 暂无条件。请为此分类添加至少一个条件以匹配笔记。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Create custom color palettes to quickly assign colors to categories. Palettes can be shared by copying/pasting the palette text when viewed in source mode.
ast.target: 创建自定义颜色调色板，以便快速为分类分配颜色。在源代码模式下查看时，可以通过复制/粘贴调色板文本来共享调色板。

ast.name: textContent
ast.target: 文本格式（颜色名称: #十六进制代码，每行一个）：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Add an emoji or Lucide icon to this category
ast.target: 为此分类添加表情符号或 Lucide 图标

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: ⚠ Please select at least one month.

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: ⚠ Months must be consecutive. Remove gaps between selected months.
ast.target: ⚠ 月份必须连续。请移除所选月份之间的间隔。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Tip: Months can wrap across year boundary (e.g., Nov-Dec-Jan-Feb for Winter).
ast.target: 提示：月份可以跨越年份边界（例如，冬季的十一月-十二月-一月-二月）。

ast.name: textContent
ast.target: 此时间段的自定义设置：

ast.name: title
ast.source: Using custom folder, template, or color instead of group defaults
ast.target: 使用自定义文件夹、模板或颜色，而非分组默认值

ast.name: title
ast.source: Used by another period in this group
ast.target: 已被此分组中的另一个时间段使用

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Use native Daily Notes plugin's "New file location"
ast.target: 使用原生每日笔记插件的“新文件位置”

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 的模板文件夹

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Row above month with week spans
ast.target: 月份行上方，带有周跨度

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Divider before first day of week
ast.target: 每周第一天之前的分隔线

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 或 - 任意条件匹配即可

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 与 - 所有条件必须匹配

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Use year where most months fall
ast.target: 使用多数月份所在的年份

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 使用最后一个月的年份

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Disable Category — it acts like deletion but is recoverable here. Proceed?
ast.target: 禁用分类 — 其效果类似于删除，但可在此处恢复。是否继续？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Disable Category — it acts like deletion but is recoverable in settings. Proceed?
ast.target: 禁用分类 — 其效果类似于删除，但可在设置中恢复。是否继续？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether the calendar fits the screen width or becomes scrollable with wider cells
ast.target: 选择日历是适应屏幕宽度还是变为可滚动且单元格更宽的模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum width for each day cell in pixels (default: 30)
ast.target: 每个日期单元格的最小宽度（像素，默认值：30）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to align the calendar columns: by weekday or by date (all 1st days align, all 2nd days align, etc.)
ast.target: 选择日历列的对齐方式：按星期几或按日期（所有1号对齐，所有2号对齐，依此类推）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which day the week starts on
ast.target: 选择一周从哪一天开始

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which weekdays to visually highlight (typically weekends)
ast.target: 选择要视觉高亮显示的星期几（通常是周末）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display thin borders around day cells and week span cells
ast.target: 在日期单元格和周跨度单元格周围显示细边框

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where to look for and create daily notes
ast.target: 选择查找和创建每日笔记的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path for daily notes. Searches subfolders too.
ast.target: 每日笔记的文件夹路径。也会搜索子文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display daily notes as separate note cells in addition to the day number links
ast.target: 除了日期数字链接外，还将每日笔记显示为单独的笔记单元格

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display notes that have both a date and additional text in their filename (e.g., "2024-01-15 Meeting Notes")
ast.target: 显示文件名中同时包含日期和附加文本的笔记（例如，“2024-01-15 会议记录”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also hide the second date in multi-day note titles (e.g., show "Trip" instead of "to 2024-01-17 Trip"). Note: enabling this will also hide whatever appears between the two dates (e.g., "to" or "–").
ast.target: 同时隐藏多日笔记标题中的第二个日期部分（例如，显示“旅行”而不是“至 2024-01-17 旅行”）。注意：启用此选项也会隐藏两个日期之间出现的任何内容（例如“至”或“–”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When displaying notes in the calendar, hide the date portion of the title and only show the text (e.g., show "Meeting Notes" instead of "2024-01-15 Meeting Notes")
ast.target: 在日历中显示笔记时，隐藏标题中的日期部分，仅显示文本（例如，显示“会议记录”而不是“2024-01-15 会议记录”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to look for template files

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to search for template files
ast.target: 搜索模板文件的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to show week numbers in the calendar
ast.target: 如何在日历中显示周数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display thin borders on the bottom of week span cells
ast.target: 在周跨度单元格底部显示细边框

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Color for the divider between weeks in the header row and day cells
ast.target: 标题行和日期单元格中周间分隔线的颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create notes directly from the calendar with Cmd/Ctrl+Click
ast.target: 通过 Cmd/Ctrl+Click 直接从日历创建笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display an "Add Note" button in the calendar header for easy access
ast.target: 在日历标题中显示“添加笔记”按钮以便于访问

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where new notes should be saved by default
ast.target: 新笔记默认保存的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where quick notes should be saved
ast.target: 快速笔记应保存的路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default property name for start date
ast.target: 开始日期的默认属性名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default property name for end date
ast.target: 结束日期的默认属性名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow note names to wrap to multiple lines instead of truncating. Best for wider cells.
ast.target: 允许笔记名称换行到多行，而不是截断。最适合较宽的单元格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rotate note names 90 degrees vertically. Creative use of vertical space.
ast.target: 将笔记名称垂直旋转90度。创造性地利用垂直空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use smaller font size (0.75em) for note names to fit more text.
ast.target: 使用较小的字体大小（0.75em）显示笔记名称，以容纳更多文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reduce spacing between letters to fit more text in the same space.
ast.target: 减少字母间距，以便在相同空间内容纳更多文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn the color categories feature on or off.
ast.target: 开启或关闭颜色类别功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a row at the top of the calendar showing all categories as clickable chips.
ast.target: 在日历顶部显示一行，将所有类别显示为可点击的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display category icons before note titles in the calendar. Turn off to show only colors.
ast.target: 在日历中笔记标题前显示类别图标。关闭则仅显示颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Color for notes that don't match any category.
ast.target: 不匹配任何类别的笔记的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show recurring notes (birthdays, anniversaries, etc.) on every matching date.
ast.target: 在每个匹配的日期上显示重复笔记（生日、纪念日等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a color for this category
ast.target: 为此类别选择一种颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Search for emoji or Lucide icon
ast.target: 搜索表情符号或 Lucide 图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how conditions should be evaluated

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 此时间段的显示名称（例如，“第一学期”、“冬季”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which year to use when the period spans across year boundary
ast.target: 当时间段跨越年份边界时使用哪一年

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the group's folder, template, and color settings
ast.target: 使用组的文件夹、模板和颜色设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template file to use when creating notes for this period
ast.target: 为此时间段创建笔记时使用的模板文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visual indicator color for this period in the calendar
ast.target: 此时间段在日历中的视觉指示器颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the title for your new note

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an end date for multi-day notes
ast.target: 为多日笔记添加结束日期

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义每日笔记文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show daily notes in calendar cells
ast.target: 在日历单元格中显示每日笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show notes with date and text
ast.target: 显示包含日期和文本的笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide second date portion (for multi-day notes)
ast.target: 隐藏第二个日期部分（用于多日笔记）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 隐藏标题中的日期部分

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use Periodic Notes plugin settings (enable only if you know what you are doing)
ast.target: 使用 Periodic Notes 插件设置（仅在您了解其作用时启用）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Edit recurring rule for current note
ast.target: 编辑当前笔记的周期性规则

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how dates are extracted from your notes to display them in the calendar.
ast.target: 配置如何从笔记中提取日期以在日历中显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Properties are checked in order from top to bottom. Drag to reorder.
ast.target: 属性按从上到下的顺序检查。拖动以重新排序。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 当两者都可用时，优先使用：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 结束日期（用于多日事件）

ast.name: text
ast.source: For recurring dates like birthdays and anniversaries, set up recurring date properties in the
ast.target: 对于生日和纪念日等重复日期，请在

ast.name: text
ast.target: 周期性事件" 选项卡中设置重复日期属性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: By default, all notes with valid dates are shown. Add filters to include or exclude specific notes.
ast.target: 默认情况下，显示所有具有有效日期的笔记。添加筛选器以包含或排除特定笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No conditions added yet. Click "+ Add condition" to get started.
ast.target: 尚未添加任何条件。点击 \"+ 添加条件\" 开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Daily notes are always accessible via the day numbers in the calendar. You can click any day number to open or create a daily note.
ast.target: 每日笔记始终可通过日历中的日期数字访问。您可以点击任何日期数字来打开或创建每日笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Notes with Date and Text in Title
ast.target: 标题中包含日期和文本的笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly, and custom period notes. Compatible with the Periodic Notes plugin.
ast.target: 配置每周、每月、每季度、每年和自定义周期笔记。与周期笔记插件兼容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create groups of custom periods (e.g., Semesters, Seasons). Each enabled group gets its own column in the calendar. Periods within a group cannot have overlapping months and must use consecutive months.
ast.target: 创建自定义周期分组（例如：学期、季节）。每个启用的分组在日历中都有自己的列。分组内的周期不能有重叠的月份，并且必须使用连续的月份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create notes directly from the calendar by Cmd/Ctrl+clicking on day numbers. Click and drag to select a date range for multi-day notes.
ast.target: 通过在日期数字上按 Cmd/Ctrl+点击，直接从日历创建笔记。点击并拖动可选择日期范围以创建多日笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Default metadata that will be pre-filled when creating a new note
ast.target: 创建新笔记时将预填充的默认元数据

ast.name: text
ast.source: Test different ways to display note titles in calendar cells. These features are experimental and may change.
ast.target: 测试在日历单元格中显示笔记标题的不同方式。这些功能是实验性的，可能会发生变化。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Show welcome banners again to see tips and instructions.
ast.target: 再次显示欢迎横幅以查看提示和说明。

ast.name: text
ast.target: （可选 - 创建可重复使用的颜色集）

ast.name: text
ast.source: No rules yet. Add one below.
ast.target: 暂无规则。请在下方添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If set, the rule starts from that date (YYYY-MM-DD).
ast.target: 如果设置，规则将从该日期开始 (YYYY-MM-DD)。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If set, the note stops appearing after that date.
ast.target: 如果设置，笔记将在该日期之后停止出现。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No conditions yet. Add at least one condition for this category to match notes.
ast.target: 暂无条件。请为此类别添加至少一个条件以匹配笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No RRULE property rules configured. Add one (with "RRULE pattern" format) in the Recurring Events settings tab first.
ast.target: 未配置 RRULE 属性规则。请先在周期性事件设置选项卡中添加一个（格式为 \"RRULE pattern\"）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add custom properties and tags to your note
ast.target: 为您的笔记添加自定义属性和标签

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hide this section by disabling Color Categories in the settings.
ast.target: 通过在设置中禁用颜色类别来隐藏此部分。
